summary: Iteration 67 - Content Quality Fixes and UI Improvements. All 21 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests verified sentence field in case creation form, dashboard functionality, and login flow. All requested features verified: cleanAIContent functions strip AI preamble and bracket placeholders, extractSentenceSummary uses caseData.sentence first, section filtering removes content < 30 chars, sentence field added to Case/CaseCreate models, report_guardrails include anti-preamble and anti-bracket instructions, iOS fix for timeline PDF export, Print button calls window.print().

issues: Console warnings about Missing Description for DialogContent - minor accessibility issue

context_for_next_testing_agent: Content quality fixes verified: cleanAIContent strips AI preamble and bracket placeholders in both ReportView and BarristerView. extractSentenceSummary uses caseData.sentence field first before regex fallback. Section filtering removes empty/short sections. Sentence field added to Case model and Dashboard form. report_guardrails in server.py include explicit anti-preamble and anti-bracket instructions. iOS fix for timeline PDF export implemented. Print button working.
